message:
fix(ft-2xnop): add unix umask coverage to pty CommandBuilder serde proptests + cancellation concurrency tests

CommandBuilder serde proptests (proptest_cmdbuilder_serde.rs) now cover
the unix-only `umask: Option<libc::mode_t>` field that was previously
skipped despite being part of the derived Serialize/Deserialize surface.
The new `command_builder_umask_json_roundtrip` proptest generates
`Option<mode_t>` values (None + 0..0o7777), verifies PartialEq roundtrip
through JSON, and inspects the serialized JSON Value to confirm the umask
field is preserved. [ft-2xnop]

Also adds 6 concurrency tests to cancellation.rs covering previously
untested paths:
- concurrent_child_creation_all_registered: 10 threads spawn children simultaneously
- cancel_races_child_creation_all_children_see_cancellation: cancel+child race (20 rounds)
- prune_is_idempotent: second prune finds nothing
- deep_propagation_chain_cancels_all_levels: 5-level tree propagation
- generation_advances_on_cancel_and_propagation: generation counter monotonicity
- coordinator_prune_cancelled_across_scopes: multi-scope GC sweep

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
